description: You are a genomics researcher documenting a new RNA-seq quality control pipeline in SciNote ELN for regulatory compliance and reproducibility. Create a project named 'RNA-seq Quality Control Pipeline' containing two experiments: 'Library QC Assessment' and 'Bioinformatics Pipeline'. The 'Library QC Assessment' experiment must feature a sequential workflow of 'RNA Extraction', 'RNA Quality Assessment', 'Library Preparation', and 'Library Quantification'. The 'Bioinformatics Pipeline' experiment must feature a sequential workflow of 'Read Trimming', 'Reference Alignment', and 'Expression Quantification'. Add a protocol with at least six steps (fragmentation, first-strand synthesis, second-strand synthesis, end repair, adapter ligation, and PCR amplification) to the 'Library Preparation' task. Additionally, create an inventory named 'RNA-seq Reagents
